strategy: Hit with Life (+15%); he resists Death 40%.
Skip blades — each blade escalates his response: the 1st gives him a Tower Shield, the 2nd Plagues you, the 3rd gives Legion Shield, the 4th Virulent Plagues you. Set up with traps/Feint instead.
Don't lean on DoTs; a DoT on him makes him Mass Triage it off.
After any attack he shields whatever school hit him, so commit to one big Life hit rather than chipping.
Kill the Luminous Troglodyte before or the same round as Dewey — if Dewey dies while a minion is still up, he rejoins at full health next round.
cheatNotes: Late wizards eat a damage-less Mana Burn — join on time.
Put a DoT on him and he Mass Triages it off — don't lean on damage-over-time.
Your first damage blade or damage global gives him a Tower Shield — avoid blades.
A second blade makes him Plague your team.
A third blade gives him Legion Shield.
A fourth blade hits you with Virulent Plague; after this the blade-punish cycle restarts.
After you attack he shields the ally that got hit, in that damage school — one committed hit beats chipping.
Against an AoE he shields all three allies one by one.
Balance damage makes him place Tower Shields.
Multi-hit spells make him shield for each hit.
If Dewey dies while a minion is still alive, he rejoins at full health next round — kill the minion first or together.
